content.full_text:
June 22, 2004

Sonia R. Carvalho
Best Best & Krieger, LLP
5 Park Plaza, Suite 1500
Irvine, CA 92614

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-098

Dear Ms. Carvalho:

After additional facts were established during a conversation with the advisee, Interim Redevelopment Director Michael Hennessey, we cannot advise on his question at this time as the request involves past conduct. The Commission is unable to provide written advice on issues regarding past conduct. (See section 83114(b); regulation 18329(b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed).

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure
GW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-04-098
